description: The Continentals were a Chinese American street gang prominent in New York City's Chinatown in the early 1960s. Founded in 1961 by American-born Chinese high school students to protect Chinese students from attacks by other ethnic groups. The gang engaged primarily in non-violent crimes such as vandalism and had up to 100 members. It was active only from 1961 to 1964, succeeded by more violent gangs like the Ghost Shadows and Flying Dragons.
